top.summary: The blog highlights the latest updates in SAP Discovery Center, introduced at SAP Sapphire 2026. Key enhancements include AI maturity assessments, SAP Business Data Cloud services, improved navigation, and new Joule missions, all aimed at streamlining the transition from exploration to production-ready solutions with expert support.

title: SAP Analytics Cloud QRC2 2026 introduces enhanced features in Business Data Cloud Modeling, Data Integration, and Calculations to improve user efficiency and workflows.
preview: The updates in SAP Analytics Cloud focus on advancing data modeling and analytical capabilities for streamlined processes.
highlights: SAP Analytics Cloud QRC2 2026 introduces enhanced features in Business Data Cloud Modeling, Data Integration, and Calculations to improve user efficiency and workflows.
The updates in SAP Analytics Cloud focus on advancing data modeling and analytical capabilities for streamlined processes.
SAP's Hack2Build event showcased innovative partner applications leveraging SAP Business Data Cloud and SAP BTP.
Hack2Build highlighted the growing momentum in connecting data insights with actionable business strategies using SAP technologies.

top.title: What's New in SAP Analytics Cloud Modeling Integration & Calculations QRC2 2026 Edition
top.author: AmandaJMurphy
top.summary: The blog highlights new features in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC2 2026, focusing on advancements in Business Data Cloud Modeling, Data Integration, and Calculations. These updates aim to enhance data modeling and analytical capabilities for users. Key improvements are tailored to streamline workflows and improve efficiency.

top.title: The Flyweel is turning: Partners leverage SAP Business Data Cloud and SAP BTP during Hack2Build
top.author: hodlozinski
top.summary: The blog highlights SAP's Hack2Build event, where partners explored building applications on SAP Business Data Cloud and SAP BTP. The event demonstrated innovative uses of SAP technologies to connect data insights with actionable business strategies. It emphasizes the momentum gained in leveraging these advancements.

top.title: Configuring Single Sign-On (SSO) for SAP Datasphere using SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS)
top.author: karthikj2
top.summary: The blog provides a detailed guide on implementing Single Sign-On (SSO) for SAP Datasphere using SAP Cloud Identity Services. It focuses on leveraging the SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS) in integration with OKTA for seamless authentication.
